author: player_a
events_i_witnessed: I searched the workbench for the storage log but was struck by a severe sensory hallucination where the ink turned into worms and the floor hummed with a deafening, metallic shriek.
My vision was obscured by oily halos and the shadows in the room appeared to detach and reach toward me.
I was completely incapacitated by this sensory overload and did not notice the arrival of a third person in the chamber.
beliefs: I believe my current physical and mental breakdown is due to the toxic environment and poorly maintained systems, not a sign of my own inability to handle the situation.
I am convinced that the unrefined salt is nearby and that my professional mask is my only defense against being ejected from the facility.
I suspect I am dangerously close to losing my composure entirely if the sensory interference continues.
open_threads: I need to recover my senses and regain my composure to continue the search for the primordial-grade salt.
I must maintain my trader persona, even as the facility seemingly attempts to break my mind.
I need to determine what Maren has discovered, as she seems focused on something other than the log I was inspecting.
